<noinclude>
This is the "Signature" form.
To create a page with this form, enter the page name below;
if a page with that name already exists, you will be sent to a form to edit that page.


{{#forminput:form=Signature}}

</noinclude><includeonly>{{{info|page name=<Signature[Base page]>/Signature <unique number;start=1>}}}
<div id="wikiPreview" style="display: none; padding-bottom: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid #AAAAAA;"></div>
{{{for template|Signature}}}{{{field|Base page|hidden}}}
{| class="formtable"
! Source: {{FieldTooltip|Source}}
| {{{field|Source}}}
|-
! Description: {{FieldTooltip|Description}}
| {{{field|Description|input type=textarea}}}
|-
! Abundance in Group 1: {{FieldTooltip|Abundance in Group 1}}
| {{{field|Abundance in Group 1|property=Abundance in Group 1|input type=dropdown}}}
|-
! NCBI: <div class="text-warning">Autocomplete is only aware of names already in BugSigDB. If it does not find the name of the taxon, enter a numeric NCBI taxon identifier by searching <span class="target-blank">[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Taxonomy/Browser/wwwtax.cgi here]</span></div> 
| {{{field|NCBI|input type=tokens|values from property=NCBI|mapping template=Get name from NCBI ID|list}}}
|}
{{Form:State fields}}
{{{end template}}}

{{{standard input|save}}}
__NOTOC____NOEDITSECTION__</includeonly>
